sentence_text: The trachea and both main bronchi are patent bilaterally.
original_topic: Trachea and both main bronchi are open

sentence_text: No occlusive pathology was detected in the trachea and both main bronchi.
original_topic: No occlusive pathology was detected in the trachea and both main bronchi

sentence_text: There is a 6x9 mm nodule in the left lung upper lobe.
original_topic: There is a 6x9 mm nodule in the peripheral area in the posterior subsegment of the left lung upper lobe apicoposterior segment

sentence_text: The left lung upper lobe contains a 6x9 mm nodule.
original_topic: It is recommended that the described nodule be evaluated together with previous examinations and followed closely, if any

sentence_text: The lungs contain multiple millimetric nonspecific nodules.
original_topic: In addition, there are other millimetric nonspecific nodules in both lungs

sentence_text: No mass or infiltrative lesion was detected in both lungs.

sentence_text: Mediastinal structures cannot be evaluated optimally because contrast material is not given.
original_topic: Mediastinal structures cannot be evaluated optimally because contrast material is not given

sentence_text: The heart contour and size are normal.
original_topic: As far as can be observed: Heart contour and size are normal
